titlestmt.titleproper: Sigma Delta Epsilon, Alpha Chapter records37-4-835
titlestmt.author: Compiled by A. Lipsky

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-05-09 18:29:30 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Sigma Delta Epsilon, Alpha Chapter records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Sigma Delta Epsilon. Alpha Chapter (Cornell University)

did.physdesc: Correspondence, minutes, financial records, and reports.
did.abstract: Records pertain to the organization and functioning of Sigma Delta Epsilon.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Cornell chapter of graduate women in science organization.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records pertain to the organization and functioning of Sigma Delta Epsilon, including the constitution and Resolution of Incorporation; correspondence, minutes, financial records, and reports of the president, vice president, recording secretary, treasurer, and various committees; membership data and materials, including the initiation "chapter roll" (1921-1988) regarding initiation and other ceremonies; notes and history of the chapter; photographs; clippings, programs, and other printed materials; and reports, newsletters, and membership directories of the national organization.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Sigma Delta Epsilon, Alpha Chapter records, #37-4-835. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Special Committees for banquets, dinners, memberships
Currents lists, President's Annual Reports, Secretary's summary of business
Initiation and Installation; Conditions, Alpha and National
Vice-President's Book, Record of Attendance at Meetings
Account Book - dues, fees, gifts, postage, entertainment
Account Book - dues, postage, entertainment, savings
Format for new chapter petition - 2 petitions, Northwestern University and University of Missouri
Initiation Ceremonies for Chapter Officers and new members
Alpha Chapter Register (from Chapter Roll Book)
Membership lists of local members, past and present
Membership lists of former and current members
Secretary's Summary of Business, membership lists
Monthly Committees, membership responsibilities, programs and invitations
Examples of printed programs and invitations
Inactive Membership List (from Chapter Roll Book)
Inactive Membership List (from Chapter Roll Book)
List of Inactive Chapter Members in the Ithaca Vacinity
List of Active Ithaca Chapter Members (Alpha Chapter)
Correspondence from Sigma Delta Epsilon Members
Wedding and Birth Announcements of Members of Sigma Delta Epsilon
History of Sigma Delta Epsilon and the Alpha Chapter
Brief History of Sigma Delta Epsilon to
"Society News," verses and poetry, and other items
Summary of the Proceedings of the Conventions of Sigma Delta Epsilon
Active Members of Sigma Delta Epsilon
1988 Directory (National); Fall 1983 Bulletin, Vol. 46 #3; 1989-1991 Program Flyers; A 1988-1989 Officers List, A
1990-1991 Program Flyers, A; History of Paleontological Research Institute 1932-1982 by K.W. Palmer; 1980's program sheets, A

Envelope of obituary clippings to 1990; 1984 record of donation to plantations; Alpha History by Lois F. and Gladys Sperling, 1984; History of the sundial, no longer there; 1971 grand chapter meeting list of attendees; 1970 list of Alpha chapter members and local honorary members; handwritten manuscript, November 1968 for history on chapter growth and decline
Membership Lists, Treasurer's Reports and Treasurer's Notes
Material on the Griswold Memorial Fund at the Cornell University Plantations, Established 1984
History of the Paleontological Research Institute by Katherine V.W. Palmer
Chapter Honorary Membership, Frank H.T. Rhodes
Constitution and Bylaws, 1973 and 1978 are revised
Installation Ceremony for officers, duties of officers, and the Badge
Federation of Organizations for Professional Women (FOPW)
50th Anniversary Meeting in Ithaca, N.Y. Alpha, Hostess Chapter
Alpha Newsletters; Annual Reports and Minutes of Secretary
Reports of the Past Presidents (1976-1977; 1978-1979); Various other memos from 1977
Brief History of SDE; Alpha History after 1967 (2 copies)
Reactivation Correspondence with National and Chapters
Early History, Second copy (first copy in C.U. Archives of National)
Early History: Housekeeping and bookkeeping accounts of 1927 SDE House, War Bond Purchase 1944, 502 Dryden Road
Early Constitutions: Before 1932, Revised after 1932 (other copies in C.U. Archives)
Lua A. Minns: Certificate of Membership 1921, Memorials to Miss Minns. Her notes on expenses for Dryden Road House
Professional Skills and Roster - History, Publicity, Reports

Photocopy of December 1935 News, pg. 2 (A chapter); Photocopy of Dec. 1936 News, pg. 3 (A chapter); Photocopy of June 1936 News, pg. 3 (Badge); Photocopy of Apr. 1988 Ithaca Journal (Garden Club); second set of earlier copies/originals
Photographs mounted on poster board; 1918 Grace H. Griswold; 1922 Grace H. Griswold (these are duplicates of photos in Box 3, Folder 4); Spring 1971, Viola Graham

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folders 1-4 brought in by Lois Fogelsanger in February 1991; Folders 5-7 donated by Helen Haller, May 16, 2001

did.unittitle: President's Annual Report and Treasurer's Report
American Association for the Advancement of Science: Consortium of Affiliates for International Programs
Grand Chapter Meeting in St. Paul
